testcase.name: verifyFlipkartTitle

failure.message: Title should contain 'Flipkart' expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Title should contain 'Flipkart' expected [true] but found [false] at tests.HomePageTest.verifyFlipkartTitle(HomePageTest.java:18) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 28 stack frames
